mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username, u.real_name, s.real_name as sender_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.send_time DESC

SELECT m.*, u.username, u.real_name, s.real_name as sender_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = #{status} ORDER BY m.send_time DESC

SELECT m.*, u.username, u.real_name, s.real_name as sender_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.category = #{category} ORDER BY m.send_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.real_name, s.real_name as sender_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user s ON m.sender_id = s.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (user_id, sender_id, title, content, type, category, related_type, related_id, status, send_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{senderId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{category}, #{relatedType}, #{relatedId}, #{status}, #{sendTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET status = 'READ', read_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message SET status = 'READ', read_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO message (user_id, sender_id, title, content, type, category, related_type, related_id, status, send_time) VALUES
(#{message.userId}, #{message.senderId}, #{message.title}, #{message.content}, #{message.type}, #{message.category}, #{message.relatedType}, #{message.relatedId}, #{message.status}, #{message.sendTime})
